mapper.sql: id, subject_id, username, real_name, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, status, source, auth_version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM staff_account ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM staff_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_account ( subject_id, username, real_name, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, password_hash, must_change_password, status, source, auth_version, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{username}, #{realName}, #{nickname}, NULL, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, 0, 'active', 'local', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE staff_account SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT username, real_name, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email FROM staff_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_login_session SET session_status = 'revoked', revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), revoked_reason = #{revokedReason} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND account_type = 'staff' AND session_status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dm.staff_account_id) FROM domain_member dm JOIN domain_member_role dmr ON dmr.domain_member_id = dm.id JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id JOIN staff_account sa ON sa.id = dm.staff_account_id WHERE dm.business_domain_id = #{businessDomainId} AND dr.code = #{roleCode} AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL AND dm.status = 'active' AND sa.status = 'active' AND dm.staff_account_id <> #{excludeStaffAccountId}
